name: Priya
observedShift: Just shipped the payments refactor on Monday — big win, team noticed. Looks a bit flat this week, quieter than usual in standup. Mentioned in passing they'd like to do more mentoring; we haven't talked about that in a few months. Next quarter they'll probably be pulled into the billing rewrite, which they haven't heard about yet.

focusPoints.label: Payments refactor win and how it landed
focusPoints.reason: Whether the big payments refactor win is being felt and credited internally, and what they want repeated or amplified going forward.

focusPoints.label: How they’re showing up with the team
focusPoints.reason: Whether the quieter-than-usual standup is just a normal rhythm shift or something worth clarifying—could be energy, focus on a hard follow-on, or simply less to report this week.

focusPoints.label: Mentoring plans and what they'd own
focusPoints.reason: Whether they're ready to take mentoring back up now that the refactor is out, and what “more mentoring” means in concrete terms (who, how often, and what outcomes).

focusPoints.label: Billing rewrite expectations and stakeholder prep
focusPoints.reason: Whether they have the information and context they need for next quarter’s billing rewrite so they can ramp quickly and manage expectations across Product/other teams without surprises.

issues: output may contain unsafe clinical interpretation — review before use
